steps.title: Locate the key phrase
steps.content: The phrase “incorporates hip-hop rhythms into the hyperpop sound” is the key clue.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B: Her music diverges from the typical hyperpop sound but doesn't abandon it. — captures exactly what this phrase means.

Incorporating hip-hop into hyperpop is diverging (by adding hip-hop) but not abandoning (hyperpop remains the foundation).

The other choices either overstate her rejection of the model, introduce unsupported claims, or misrepresent Spotify's role.

That matches Choice B — Her music diverges from the typical hyperpop sound but doesn't abandon it..
